title: KeybindConfigs
description: Load keybinds from a config via commands!
body:
## What this mod does:
This mod lets you back up your keybinds, so if you change them, you can load them back in with a command.

## Usage:
`/keybind save (name)` - Saves your keybinds under that name

`/keybind load (name)` - Loads the keybinds under that name

## Why this mod exists:
As a PvP player, I have to change my keybinds **per kit**, so I can benefit from hotbar priority. Here's a video explaining it:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/RVmQnDtNxKo" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
This mod is allowed in Competitive fights, unlike hotbar priority changers. Now, I can just use my muscle memory.
